_comment: DELEGATE-FIRST: wrap your project's existing verify command as ONE gate so the harness runs your real CI, not a parallel copy. 'cmd' is any shell command. Per stack: Python -> 'pytest -q' or 'make verify' | Java -> 'mvn -q test' | C#/.NET -> 'dotnet test' | Node/TS -> 'npm run check'. Use the multi-gate '_greenfield_example' below when the project has no runner yet. The optional 'mutation' gate checks the TESTS are strong (it edits the code and confirms a test fails) — keep required:false until your suite is mature.
